hub.title: Learning Hub
hub.subtitle: Train your memory, test your understanding, and track your progress.

flashcards.title: Flashcard Decks
flashcards.description: Review due cards using spaced repetition (SM-2).

socratic.title: Socratic Questions
socratic.description: Probe your understanding by explaining a concept in your own words.

scores.title: Understanding Scores
scores.description: See how well you know each concept based on Socratic sessions.

flashcards.title: Flashcard Decks
flashcards.empty: No decks yet. Use the Socratic Agent or a template to create flashcards.

review.no_due: No cards due for this deck.

input.title: Get Socratic Questions
input.subtitle: Enter a concept to receive Socratic questions. Answer one and we'll score your understanding with feedback.
input.empty_guide: Receive Socratic-style questions about this note. Explaining things in your own words surfaces the gaps you didn't know you had.
input.note_placeholder: Paste related note content or a summary so the questions stay grounded.
input.note_hint: Up to 8,000 characters. Leave empty to get general questions about the concept alone.

questions.title: Socratic Questions
questions.subtitle: Concept: {concept}
questions.answer_placeholder: Explain it as if you were teaching someone.

result.title: Evaluation
result.flashcard_hint: Consider creating a flashcard for this concept and reviewing it on a spaced-repetition schedule.

errors.generic: Could not process the request. Please try again in a moment.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this project.
errors.no_questions: No questions were generated. Try a more specific concept.

scores.title: Understanding Scores
scores.empty: No scores yet. Complete a Socratic session to see your understanding scores.
